name: Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a pan (I used a medium-sized pot sprayed lightly with Pam) and place it in the preheating oven.
3. Mix all ingredients together.
4. Pour batter into heated pan.
5. Bake for 20 minutes.
This cornbread was quite moist and flavorful. I'd reduce or eliminate the sugar if you were serving it with chili or something similar. It's great hot out of the oven with molasses (I kept it in an airtight container overnight in the fridge, but it didn't last any longer!).
